notes.en: Install that keeps Yasmine in Bayani Mode until the timer ends; grants access to a new special move Linya ng Liwanag (fast cross-up slash); changes the properties of OD Alon (new cinematic ender)
Dashes quickly behind the opponent and hits cross-up; puts opponent into a limited juggle state
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode; plus on block advancing special but slow startup
Button strength determines projectile distance; projectile disappears if Yasmine is hit
3 hits; projectile disappears if Yasmine is hit
Feints forward movement; useful to bait Parry or Drive Impact in neutral
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode; safe on block advancing special
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode
Cinematic time regenerates ~? Drive bars for Yasmine
Available at 25% HP or below; cinematic time regenerates ~? Drive bars for Yasmine
Button strength determines trajectory
Enhances the properties of follow-up attacks
Cross-up
Cross-up
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode; properties change during SA2 install
Spends the Bayani Mode enhancement; properties change during SA2 install
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode
Spends the Bayani Mode enhancement
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode
Spends the Bayani Mode enhancement
Puts Yasmine into Bayani Mode
Spends the Bayani Mode enhancement
Side switch; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see [[Street_Fighter_6/Gauges#Drive_Reversal|Drive Reversal]].

Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see [[Street_Fighter_6/Gauges#Drive_Reversal|Drive Reversal]].
See [[Street_Fighter_6/Gauges#Drive_Impact|Drive Impact]]. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.
Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state
; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

See [[Street_Fighter_6/Gauges#Drive_Parry|Drive Parry]]. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.

See [[Street_Fighter_6/Gauges#Drive_Rush|Drive Rush]]; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties

See [[Street_Fighter_6/Gauges#Drive_Rush|Drive Rush]]; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: ? (min/throw), ? (min/block), ? (max/final DR frame)
